title: Credential Manager: High-Frequency Credential Read
description: Detects Event 5379 credential read operations at high frequency — indicates lazagne, seatbelt, or mimikatz vault::cred dumping stored credentials.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and (('Event ID' = '5379')) | stats count as Reads by User, Entity | where Reads > 20 | sort -Reads
